title: Hook kind: set-board-field
description: Sets a Projects v2 single-select or text field on the just-created or just-moved item. Per DEC-024's lifecycle-hook mechanism. Adopters declare one entry per board field they want auto-populated after the primary lifecycle operation lands. Idempotent: writing the same value is a no-op on the GitHub side.

field_id.description: Projects v2 field ID. Obtain via `gh api graphql -f query='{ node(id: "<project-id>") { ... on ProjectV2 { fields(first: 30) { nodes { ... on ProjectV2FieldCommon { id name } } } } }'`. Bootstrap validates the field exists on the configured board.

single_select_option_id.description: For single-select fields: the option's ID. Mutually exclusive with `text_value`. Bootstrap validates the option exists on the field.

text_value.description: For text fields: the literal value to write. Mutually exclusive with `single_select_option_id`.
